history.content:
<thought>
The observation shows lava directly in front of the agent (north), a wall to the left (west), and a safe floor cell to the right (east). Since moving forward is deadly, I will turn right to face the safe floor cell, allowing me to then move forward and avoid the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells ahead and two cells left. The cell directly in front of me is safe floor (`.`). The cell to my left is deadly lava (`L`),

<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells ahead and two cells to my left. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell (`.`). Turning left would lead to a lava cell (`L`) directly to my left, and turning right would lead to a wall (`#`). So moving forward is the only safe action to progress toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north (up). The cell directly in front (north) is a floor cell (`.`), which is safe to move into. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal `G` visible at row 5, column 1. After moving north to (5,3), I will need to turn left and move west to reach the goal, but the first step is clear. The cell to the west is lava `L`, so I must not turn left or move that way immediately. Thus, moving forward now is safe and progress toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing up (north). The cell immediately in front is a wall (#), so MOVE_FORWARD is not possible. To the left (west) is a floor (.) and further left is the goal G, with no lava in between. Turning left will align with the safe path to G. Turning right would face a wall. Therefore, the next action is TURN_LEFT.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells directly ahead (north). The cell immediately in front of me is a floor (safe), and the cell beyond it is the goal. No obstacles or lava block the path forward. Moving forward is safe and will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly in front of me, one cell ahead. The cell is safe (not lava or wall). Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
